page: Google Cloud Platform c2d-highmem-56 is a memory-optimized server instance powered by an AMD EPYC 7B13 processor. It features 56 vCPUs mapped to 28 physical cores with multithreading enabled on an x86_64 architecture. The instance is equipped with 448 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It does not include local storage or bundled GPUs, and it comes with zero complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

In benchmark evaluations, the instance demonstrates strong multi-core capabilities, placing in the top 25% for stress-ng multi-core CPU performance, Geekbench multi-core, and Passmark CPU scores. Memory performance is a key highlight, with the Passmark memory score reaching the top 10% tier, and small-block cached memory read bandwidth ranking in the top 25%. However, large-block uncached memory read and write speeds fall into the average category.

Given its high resource density and memory allocation, the c2d-highmem-56 offers qualitative cost efficiency for memory-bound workloads that do not require local NVMe storage or GPU acceleration. It is well-suited for large-scale database operations, as evidenced by strong Passmark database and Redis SET benchmark results. Additionally, its multi-threaded performance makes it appropriate for memory-intensive web serving, software compilation pipelines, and medium-scale language model inference tasks.
description: Google Cloud Platform c2d-highmem-56 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server instance featuring 56 vCPUs and 448 GB of RAM, powered by an AMD EPYC 7B13 processor with 28 physical cores. This instance provides a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core but does not include local storage or dedicated GPUs. Benchmark data indicates strong multi-core CPU performance and top-tier memory performance, with Passmark memory scores placing in the top 10% and multi-core Geekbench results in the top 25%. Conversely, single-core performance and uncached large-block memory bandwidth remain average. This hardware profile is qualitatively cost-efficient for memory-intensive, non-storage-bound applications. It is highly suited for large database operations, Redis deployments, software compilation, and medium-scale LLM inference workloads.
og_description: Google Cloud Platform c2d-highmem-56 is an x86_64 memory-optimized server with 56 vCPUs, 448 GB RAM, and an AMD EPYC 7B13 CPU, delivering top-tier memory performance for database and multi-threaded workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized x86_64 server featuring high memory density and strong multi-core performance for database and memory-bound workloads.

Top 10% memory performance in Passmark benchmarks
